com.honeywell.rfidservice

Interface EventListener


  • public interface EventListener

    • Method Summary

      All Methods Instance Methods Abstract Methods 
      Modifier and Type Method and Description
      void onDeviceConnected(java.lang.Object data)
      Will be called while the RFID device is disconnected.
      void onDeviceDisconnected(java.lang.Object data)
      Will be called while the RFID device is connected.
      void onReaderCreated(boolean success, RfidReader reader)
      Will be called while the RfidReader object is created.
      void onRfidTriggered(boolean trigger)
      Will be call while the trigger mode is RFID and user trigger on device.
      void onTriggerModeSwitched(TriggerMode currentMode)
      Will be call while the device trigger mode is switched.

    • Method Detail

      • onDeviceConnected

        void onDeviceConnected(java.lang.Object data)
        Will be called while the RFID device is disconnected.
        Parameters:
        data - If device is connected via Bluetooth, it will return the MAC address.

      • onDeviceDisconnected

        void onDeviceDisconnected(java.lang.Object data)
        Will be called while the RFID device is connected.
        Parameters:
        data - If device is connected via Bluetooth, it will return the MAC address.

      • onReaderCreated

        void onReaderCreated(boolean success,
                     RfidReader reader)
        Will be called while the RfidReader object is created.
        Parameters:
        success - If created successfully.
        reader - RfidReader object.

      • onRfidTriggered

        void onRfidTriggered(boolean trigger)
        Will be call while the trigger mode is RFID and user trigger on device.
        Parameters:
        trigger - Trigger or release.

      • onTriggerModeSwitched

        void onTriggerModeSwitched(TriggerMode currentMode)
        Will be call while the device trigger mode is switched.
        Parameters:
        currentMode - Current trigger mode.
